title: Warmly Spiced Vietnamese Beef Canh Chua
description: A mustardy and flaky Vietnamese dish featuring beef stock concentrate, perfect for a date night, made with rest meat and gluten free friendly ingredients. This canh chua recipe is a hearty and comforting meal.
instructions: In a large pot, combine beef stock concentrate, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, grated ginger, ground cumin, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to medium low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the rest meat to the pot and cook until it is tender, about 1 1/2 hours.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the canh chua hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs such as cilantro or basil.
Offer steamed rice or noodles on the side.
Refrigerate or freeze the leftovers for later use.
Reheat the canh chua over low heat, adding more beef stock concentrate if needed.
